name: Cabinet
description: A lightweight self-hosted file cabinet and document manager.
summary: Cabinet is an AI-first, self-hosted knowledge base and 'startup OS' built on file-based markdown storage with no database. The latest release is v0.3.4 (Apr 14, 2026), with 15 total releases and 319 commits on the main branch. Key recent additions include a provider adapter layer for AI runtime (supporting Claude Code and Codex CLI), per-run model/provider overrides, scheduled cron-based agent jobs, embedded HTML app rendering, and a web terminal. See the full release history at the repository: https://github.com/hilash/cabinet.

answers.Is the project actively maintained?: Yes — 15 releases, 319 commits, latest release v0.3.4 on Apr 14, 2026
answers.Does it support user authentication?: Optional — set KB_PASSWORD env variable to protect the UI; empty means no auth
answers.Is there a Docker image available?: Partial — a .dockerignore file exists suggesting Docker support, but no official image is explicitly documented

alternatives.name: Paperless-ngx
alternatives.review: Paperless-ngx offers far more powerful OCR, tagging, and document indexing than Cabinet but requires significantly more setup and system resources.

alternatives.name: Teedy
alternatives.review: Teedy provides a more feature-rich document management system with workflows and user roles, but is heavier and more complex to configure than Cabinet.

alternatives.name: Nextcloud
alternatives.review: Nextcloud is a comprehensive self-hosted cloud platform that includes file management but is far heavier and more complex than the focused simplicity of Cabinet.

alternatives.name: Docspell
alternatives.review: Docspell excels at automated document processing and tagging with deep OCR integration, but demands more infrastructure and technical expertise than Cabinet.

alternatives.name: Filestash
alternatives.review: Filestash is similarly lightweight and focused on file browsing with broad storage backend support, but lacks dedicated document management and organization features found in Cabinet.
